person_name: Marcus Terentius Varro, Roman scholar and writer (116–27 BCE)
person_name_full: Marcus Terentius Varro, Roman scholar and writer (116–27 BCE)
notes: Roman scholar and writer, considered the most learned of the Latin grammarians in his time.

docs.title: Life of Julius Caesar
docs.author: Suetonius
docs.excerpt: To the loss of the first three books, are to be added several chasms in the others; but fortunately they happen in such places as not to affect the coherency of the author's doctrine, though they interrupt the illustration of
